html:
Exclusive to:

Classic Record QuotesCreepy Forest Record QuotesD.R. Style Record QuotesE.F.S. Record QuotesHallowed Night Record QuotesJIMBO

The Record is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 1 Batilisk Wing and 1 Charcoal and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype. There are 4 variants of Records by default that can be selected by choosing a skin, and 1 extra skin that can be obtained from the Hallowed nights 2024 comic on the Klei website. Players can use Clean Sweeper to change the skin as well as the track.

A Record can be put into a Gramophone to play a song. If a Record is already in the Gramophone, it will be dropped when a new Record is inserted.

A special Record can be acquired only from playing the game with JIMBO. Players can use the Clean Sweeper to change its appearance to other music (excluding Classic), but its unique track is exclusive to this Record. In other words, reskinning a crafted Record will not grant access to this song.

The following Records are currently available:

Item Name Played
Classic
Creepy Forest
D.R. Style
E.F.S.
Hallowed Night
JIMBO

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Complimentary E.F.S., Complimentary D.R. Style and Complimentary Creepy Forest Records are available to all players initially and were introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • The Loyal Hallowed Night Record can be obtained in the site for the Hallowed Nights 2024 Comic.
Complimentary
E.F.S.
This track is to die for!
Complimentary
D.R. Style
Get frighteningly funky.
Complimentary
Creepy Forest
Lost in the woods? We have a song for that!
Loyal
Hallowed Nights Collection
Hallowed Night
Soundtrack of the Night!

Trivia

  • The Record was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • The blue, orange and red records were found a long time ago in the files of the original Don't Starve.
  • There are unused quotes for records labeled "DANGER", "DAWN", "DUSK", "END", "MAIN", and "WORKTOBEDONE".
  • The JIMBO Record is added in the A Royal Welcome for Jimbo update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Classic Record QuotesCreepy Forest Record QuotesD.R. Style Record QuotesE.F.S. Record QuotesHallowed Night Record QuotesJIMBO
“Drat, I just got that song out of my head!”
–Wilson, when examining the Classic Record
“Hey Max, it's your favorite!”
–Willow, when examining the Classic Record
“This give Wolfgang bad feelings.”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Classic Record
“I wondered if I'd ever hear that song again.”
–Wendy, when examining the Classic Record
“I FEEL NOTHING”
–WX-78, when examining the Classic Record
“I could see it getting a tad repetitive.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Classic Record
“Classic.”
–Woodie, when examining the Classic Record
“Destroy it!”
–Maxwell, when examining the Classic Record
“T'wöuld be a kindness tö keep it fröm reaching the ears öf my ally.”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Classic Record
“It's a real earworm!”
–Webber, when examining the Classic Record
“Now where have I heard that before?”
–Warly, when examining the Classic Record
“Forever song”
–Wormwood, when examining the Classic Record
“Just plain unsettlin'.”
–Winona, when examining the Classic Record
“Encore!”
–Wortox, when examining the Classic Record
“Again.”
–Wurt, when examining the Classic Record
“I could listen to this forever!”
–Walter, when examining the Classic Record
“Is this that newfangled ragtime music the youth are raving about?”
–Wanda, when examining the Classic Record
“A whole song on one record? Technology has come so far.”
–Wilson, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“It's always nice to have some music while you're busy burning stuff.”
–Willow, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“No. Wolfgang don't like.”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?”
–Wendy, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“I FEEL NOTHING”
–WX-78, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“You can really swing an axe to this.”
–Woodie, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Forgive me if I've lost my taste for music.”
–Maxwell, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Music is nöurishment for thy söul!”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“It's his favorite song!”
–Webber, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“A feast for the ears!”
–Warly, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Friend song!”
–Wormwood, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“That's a real toe-tapper!”
–Winona, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“What a cheeky little tune.”
–Wortox, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Boring. Next one.”
–Wurt, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.”
–Walter, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“Do I look like I have time to sit around listening to records?”
–Wanda, when examining the Creepy Forest Record
“A whole song on one record? Technology has come so far.”
–Wilson, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“There's something so nostalgic about the way it pops and crackles.”
–Willow, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Watch Wolfgang dance!”
–Wolfgang, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?”
–Wendy, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“I FEEL NOTHING. NO. HATE IT”
–WX-78, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“The music was better back in my day.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“What a nifty number, eh Luce?”
–Woodie, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Silence would be preferable.”
–Maxwell, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“The musicians play with such passiön!”
–Wigfrid, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“It makes us want to do a little dance!”
–Webber, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“What a sweet sound it makes.”
–Warly, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Bouncy!”
–Wormwood, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“She's a doozy.”
–Winona, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“I think I heard this in a dream.”
–Wortox, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Too long.”
–Wurt, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“Woby likes to howl along, don't you girl?”
–Walter, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“I prefer their earlier work.”
–Wanda, when examining the D.R. Style Record
“One of their more experimental tracks.”
–Wilson, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“There's something so nostalgic about the way it pops and crackles.”
–Willow, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Terrible!”
–Wolfgang, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“A song of sweet foreboding.”
–Wendy, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“HMM. STILL NOTHING”
–WX-78, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“The music was better back in my day.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“This gets me all fired up.”
–Woodie, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Silence would be preferable.”
–Maxwell, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Döth the tempö nöt make öne's heart race with excitement?”
–Wigfrid, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“This one's kind of scary.”
–Webber, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“A feast for the ears!”
–Warly, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Bouncy!”
–Wormwood, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Here we go.”
–Winona, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Oh dear, what have we here?”
–Wortox, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Don't like. Next.”
–Wurt, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.”
–Walter, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“I prefer their later work.”
–Wanda, when examining the E.F.S. Record
“Spooktacular!”
–Wilson, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“This track makes me feel... mischievous.”
–Willow, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“We listen together, yes?”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Love it.”
–Wendy, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“SLIGHT TOE-TAPPING DETECTED”
–WX-78, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Tsk. This type of music inspires all manner of mischief.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“You can really... swing an axe to this.”
–Woodie, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Ugh, no more.”
–Maxwell, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“A serenade for the ghosts and ghouls.”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“We want candy.”
–Webber, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“It really sets the mood.”
–Warly, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Spooky spooky”
–Wormwood, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Gives me the heebie jeebies.”
–Winona, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Thrilling and chilling!”
–Wortox, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Like this one.”
–Wurt, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Instant classic!”
–Walter, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“This takes me back.”
–Wanda, when examining the Hallowed Night Record
“Irresistible! It's like it touches my mind!”
–Wilson
“This song is kind of mesmerizing.”
–Willow
“Song make Wolfgang shoulders bounce.”
–Wolfgang
“It brightens my mood, if only for a while.”
–Wendy
“I HATE IT. PLAY IT AGAIN”
–WX-78
“The music was better back in my day... but let's hear it again.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a good little number.”
–Woodie
“The jovial sound invades my mind. Keep it off.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a ballad öf göod hap!”
–Wigfrid
“It makes us happy!”
–Webber
“Reminds me of fun times.”
–Warly
“Happy game song”
–Wormwood
“That's just plain fun!”
–Winona
“A game is always good for the soul!”
–Wortox
“Again!”
–Wurt
“That's right, Woby! It's a real doozy!”
–Walter
“I've heard it before and I'll hear it again.”
–Wanda
The Record is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 1 Batilisk Wing and 1 Charcoal and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype. There are 4 variants of Records by default that can be selected by choosing a skin, and 1 extra skin that can be obtained from the Hallowed nights 2024 comic on the Klei website. Players can use Clean Sweeper to change the skin as well as the track.
A Record can be put into a Gramophone to play a song. If a Record is already in the Gramophone, it will be dropped when a new Record is inserted.
A special Record can be acquired only from playing the game with JIMBO. Players can use the Clean Sweeper to change its appearance to other music (excluding Classic), but its unique track is exclusive to this Record. In other words, reskinning a crafted Record will not grant access to this song.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kỷ Lục là một vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond. Nó có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc trang trí với 1 Cánh Tử xà và 1 Than và yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Theo mặc định, có 4 biến thể của Bản ghi có thể được chọn bằng cách chọn trang phục và 1 trang phục bổ sung có thể nhận được từ truyện tranh Đêm thiêng liêng 2024 trên trang web Klei. Người chơi có thể sử dụng Clean Sweeper để thay đổi skin cũng như đường đi.
